formula_display: Net perimeter = room_perimeter - (doors ГѓвЂ” door_width); Boards = ceil(net_perimeter ГѓвЂ” 1.05 ГѓВ· board_length)
result_context: Net perimeter: {net_perimeter_m} m, linear metres: {linear_meters} m, boards: {boards_needed}

Boards (2.4 m each): ceil(17.01 ГѓВ· 2.4) = 8 boards
mistakes: Including door openings in the perimeter instead of subtracting them
Forgetting to account for inside corners where boards meet
Not allowing for end cuts Гўв‚¬вЂќ the offcut from one wall can often start the next
